user.title: Add a Not a PLC service
user.description: Each service runs its own program on its own scan loop. Name it, pick a starter program and choose how often it scans. You can add more services later and edit the program in a future update.

init.title: Not a PLC service options
init.description: Bind each program input to a Home Assistant entity and set how often the program scans.

abort.not_loaded: This Not a PLC service is not running.

error.invalid_program: Those bindings produced an invalid program.
